label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this problem step by step. So, we have five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them has a partner at the start of the song. The partners are: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga The question is about tracking how their partners change through a series of swaps. The goal is to find out who Bob is dancing with at the end. Let me note down the initial pairings first to keep track. Initial pairings: 1. Alice - Lola 2. Bob - Karl 3. Claire - Patrick 4. Dave - Sam 5. Eve - Helga Now, the problem states several partner switches. Let's go through each one in the order they are mentioned. First swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. So, Dave was originally with Sam, and Alice was originally with Lola. After they switch, Dave will be with Lola, and Alice will be with Sam. Let me update the pairings after the first swap: 1. Alice - Sam (originally Dave's partner) 2. Bob - Karl 3. Claire - Patrick 4. Dave - Lola (originally Alice's partner) 5. Eve - Helga Second swap: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve is currently with Helga, and Alice is currently with Sam. After swapping, Eve will take Alice's partner (Sam), and Alice will take Eve's partner (Helga). Updating pairings after the second swap: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Karl 3. Claire - Patrick 4. Dave - Lola 5. Eve - Sam Third swap: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob is currently with Karl, and Dave is currently with Lola. After swapping, Bob will be with Lola, and Dave will be with Karl. Third swap pairings: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Lola 3. Claire - Patrick 4. Dave - Karl 5. Eve - Sam Fourth swap: Bob and Eve switch partners. Bob is currently with Lola, and Eve is currently with Sam. After swapping, Bob takes Sam, and Eve takes Lola. Fourth swap pairings: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Sam 3. Claire - Patrick 4. Dave - Karl 5. Eve - Lola Fifth swap: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is currently with Sam, Claire is with Patrick. After swapping, Bob takes Patrick, and Claire takes Sam. Fifth swap pairings: 1. Alice - Helga 2. Bob - Patrick 3. Claire - Sam 4. Dave - Karl 5. Eve - Lola Wait, but the options given for Bob's partner at the end are Lola, Karl, Patrick, Sam, or Helga. According to my calculations, Bob ends up with Patrick. But looking at the options, (C) is Patrick. But let me double-check my steps to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Let me go through each swap again. Initial: - A-L, B-K, C-P, D-S, E-H First swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave (S) and Alice (L) switch. Now: - A-S, B-K, C-P, D-L, E-H Second swap: Eve and Alice switch. Eve (H) and Alice (S) switch. Now: - A-H, B-K, C-P, D-L, E-S Third swap: Bob (K) and Dave (L) switch. - A-H, B-L, C-P, D-K, E-S Fourth swap: Bob (L) and Eve (S) switch. - A-H, B-S, C-P, D-K, E-L Fifth swap: Bob (S) and Claire (P) switch. - A-H, B-P, C-S, D-K, E-L So yes, Bob ends up with Patrick. Which is option (C). But let me check the options again as listed in the problem statement. Options: (A) Lola (B) Karl (C) Patrick (D) Sam (E) Helga Yes, option (C) is Patrick. Therefore, the answer should be (C). Wait, but let me check once again if I misread any of the swaps. The swaps are: 1. Dave and Alice switch partners. 2. Eve and Alice switch partners. 3. Bob and Dave switch partners. 4. Bob and Eve switch partners. 5. Bob and Claire switch partners.
